ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: RAYMOND K. WONG; Proceedings not reported. (610)
